parameters.query:
ALTER TABLE candidates
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS job_requisition_id INTEGER REFERENCES job_requisitions(id) ON DELETE SET NULL;

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_candidates_job_requisition
ON candidates(job_requisition_id);

WITH params AS (
  SELECT {{ (($json.body && $json.body.dry_run) || $json.dry_run || ($json.query && $json.query.dry_run) || false) ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE' }}::BOOLEAN AS dry_run
),
alias_match AS (
  SELECT
    c.id,
    c.name,
    c.department,
    c.applied_position,
    c.job_requisition_id AS old_job_requisition_id,
    CASE
      WHEN c.applied_position LIKE '%' || U&'SAR\5DE5\7A0B\5E2B' || '%'
        OR c.applied_position LIKE '%' || U&'SAR\6E2C\8A66\5DE5\7A0B\5E2B' || '%'
        OR lower(c.applied_position) LIKE '%rfsar%'
        OR lower(c.applied_position) LIKE '%sar???%'
        THEN 23
      WHEN c.applied_position LIKE '%' || U&'MIS\7DB2\7BA1\5DE5\7A0B\5E2B' || '%'
        OR c.applied_position LIKE '%' || U&'MIS\7DB2\7BA1' || '%'
        OR lower(c.applied_position) LIKE '%mis?????%'
        OR lower(c.applied_position) LIKE '%mis??%'
        THEN 17
      WHEN c.applied_position LIKE '%' || U&'AI\8EDF\9AD4\5DE5\7A0B\5E2B' || '%'
        OR lower(c.applied_position) LIKE '%ai?????%'
        THEN 27
      WHEN c.applied_position LIKE '%' || U&'\4E94\90E8\696D\52D9\52A9\7406' || '%'
        THEN 14
      ELSE NULL
    END AS new_job_requisition_id
  FROM candidates c
),
proposed_changes AS (
  SELECT
    a.id,
    a.name,
    a.department AS old_department,
    a.applied_position AS old_position,
    a.old_job_requisition_id,
    j.department AS new_department,
    j.position_title AS new_position,
    a.new_job_requisition_id
  FROM alias_match a
  JOIN job_requisitions j ON j.id = a.new_job_requisition_id
  WHERE a.new_job_requisition_id IS NOT NULL
    AND j.status <> 'cancelled'
    AND (
      a.old_job_requisition_id IS DISTINCT FROM a.new_job_requisition_id
      OR a.department IS DISTINCT FROM j.department
      OR a.applied_position IS DISTINCT FROM j.position_title
    )
),
updated AS (
  UPDATE candidates c
  SET
    job_requisition_id = p.new_job_requisition_id,
    department = p.new_department,
    applied_position = p.new_position
  FROM proposed_changes p, params prm
  WHERE c.id = p.id
    AND NOT prm.dry_run
  RETURNING
    c.id,
    p.name,
    p.old_department,
    p.old_position,
    p.old_job_requisition_id,
    p.new_department,
    p.new_position,
    p.new_job_requisition_id
),
unlinked AS (
  SELECT id, name, department, applied_position
  FROM candidates
  WHERE job_requisition_id IS NULL
  ORDER BY id DESC
  LIMIT 20
),
changed AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM proposed_changes
  ORDER BY id DESC
  LIMIT 20
)
SELECT
  (SELECT dry_run FROM params) AS dry_run,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM candidates) AS total_candidates,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM candidates WHERE job_requisition_id IS NOT NULL) AS linked_candidates,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM candidates WHERE job_requisition_id IS NULL) AS unlinked_candidates,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM proposed_changes) AS would_change_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM updated) AS updated_this_run,
  COALESCE((
    SELECT json_agg(json_build_object(
      'id', ch.id,
      'name', ch.name,
      'old_department', ch.old_department,
      'old_position', ch.old_position,
      'old_job_requisition_id', ch.old_job_requisition_id,
      'new_department', ch.new_department,
      'new_position', ch.new_position,
      'new_job_requisition_id', ch.new_job_requisition_id
    ) ORDER BY ch.id DESC)
    FROM changed ch
  ), '[]'::json) AS changed_samples,
  COALESCE((
    SELECT json_agg(json_build_object(
      'id', u.id,
      'name', u.name,
      'department', u.department,
      'applied_position', u.applied_position
    ) ORDER BY u.id DESC)
    FROM unlinked u
  ), '[]'::json) AS unlinked_samples;

parameters.jsCode:
const rows = $input.all().map((item) => item.json);
return { json_response: JSON.stringify({ ok: true, rows }) };
